name: Boss is mad I filed workers comp in Bountiful Utah, can they fire me?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed workers comp in Bountiful Utah, can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation is illegal—Utah protects filing workers.** Employers can't punish claims[4]. **Key factors:** Document threats; file complaint if demoted/fired. **Practical guidance:** Keep job search under restrictions, report retaliation to Labor Commission. Lawyer helps prove. **Protection ensures fair claims.**
